THREE TREES UPROOTED IN AREA NEAR WEST 7TH AND 8TH STREETS IN ANDERSON. ONE APPROXIMATELY 36 INCHES IN DIAMETER, ANOTHER 48 INCHES IN DIAMETER. TWO HOMES SUSTAINED STRUCTURAL DAMAGE FROM THESE TREES FALLING ONTO ROOFS.

SEVERAL BUILDINGS DAMAGED DOWNTOWN ANDERSON. A COUPLE WINDOWS BLOWN OUT AND A PORTION OF ROOF DAMAGED 1500 BLOCK OF NOBLE ST. STORE FRONT AT 14TH AND MERIDIAN ALSO HAD A WINDOW BLOWN OUT. AN RV WAS FLIPPED OVER IN PARKING LOT AT 32ND AND SCATTERFIELD. ROOF OF WAREHOUSE PARTIALLY OFF IN SAME AREA.
9 POWER POLES KNOCKED DOWN, SOME BROKEN AT THE GROUND ALONG CO RD 1550 NORTH JUST WEST OF STATE ROUTE 9. POWER LINES DOWN AS WELL. DAMAGE TO A WHEAT FIELD JUST SOUTH ALONG CO RD 1450 NORTH.
